title: Milos Stanisavljevic
text: Home * People * Milos Stanisavljevic Milos Stanisavljevic [1] Milos Stanisavljevic (Miloš Stanisavljević), a Serbian electrical engineer holding a Diplom from University of Belgrade in 2004, and a Ph.D. on microelectronics from École Polytechnique Fédérale de Lausanne in 2009 [2] , actually visiting scientist at IBM Zurich Research Laboratory . His professional interests include microelectronics and nanoelectronics , in particular he is researching on multi-level cell memory , his private interests include computer chess. Contents 1 Computer Chess 2 Selected Publications 2.1 2005 ... 2.2 2010 ... 2.3 2015 ... 3 Forum Posts 3.1 2009 3.2 2010 3.3 2011 3.4 2013 4 External Links 5 References Computer Chess [ edit ] Milos Stanisavljevic is a formidable expert of the Ippolit family of engines [3] [4] , and advocate of Ippolit's originality, despite his note it used ideas from reverse engineering Rybka 3 [5] . He further stands sentinel [6] [7] [8] over a stable RobboLito release under the GNU GPL , which is due to misuse no longer available for download [9] . Further, along with Norman Schmidt , Milos Stanisavljevic worked on Fire , derived from IvanHoe and the Ippolit series of programs [10] . Selected Publications [ edit ] [11] 2005 ...
